calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-015 handcrafted goal cue diagnostic -- oracle vs absent
items.notes: EXP-0091. Critical diagnostic: if E3 cannot exploit a perfect oracle goal signal, selection mechanism is broken. If it can, representation is the bottleneck.

items.title: SD-003 full latent counterfactual on z_harm_s (post-SD-011 anchor)
items.notes: EXP-0094. Anchor: responsibility/attribution is real. EXQ-030b pipeline transposed to z_harm_s with ResidualHarmForward (identity-collapse fix) + Fix #2 (distribution matching). 4 seeds, 6 criteria. Supersedes EXQ-166e scalar proxy.
